name: Minecraft (Packwiz)
description: A Minecraft server using packwiz for git-based modpack management. Automatically installs and updates mods from your packwiz configuration.
startup: echo "[Packwiz] Running packwiz update before server start..." && packwiz update || echo "[Packwiz] WARNING: update failed, continuing anyway..." && echo "[Server] Starting Minecraft server on port {{SERVER_PORT}}..." && java -Xms{{STARTER_MEM}}m -Xmx{{MAX_MEM}}m {{JAVA_OPTS}} -jar server.jar

fileboard.name: packwiz.toml
fileboard.description: Main packwiz configuration file. REQUIRED - points to your modpack source.

fileboard.name: mods/
fileboard.description: Directory containing mod references managed by packwiz.

fileboard.name: config/
fileboard.description: Optional directory for config file overrides.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "========================================"
echo "  Packwiz Minecraft Server Setup"
echo "========================================"

# Install packwiz if not already present
if ! command -v packwiz &> /dev/null; then
  echo "[1/3] Installing packwiz..."
  ARCH=$(uname -m)
  case $ARCH in
    x86_64) ARCH="amd64" ;;
    aarch64|arm64) ARCH="arm64" ;;
    *) echo "ERROR: Unsupported architecture: $ARCH"; exit 1 ;;
  esac

  PACKWIZ_VERSION="1.3.2"
  echo "  Downloading packwiz v${PACKWIZ_VERSION} for ${ARCH}..."
  curl -sL "https://github.com/packwiz/packwiz/releases/download/v${PACKWIZ_VERSION}/packwiz_${PACKWIZ_VERSION}_linux_${ARCH}.tar.gz" -o /tmp/packwiz.tar.gz
  tar -xzf /tmp/packwiz.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin/
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/packwiz
  rm -f /tmp/packwiz.tar.gz
  echo "  packwiz v${PACKWIZ_VERSION} installed successfully."
else
  echo "[1/3] packwiz already installed: $(packwiz --version)"
fi

# Clone packwiz repo if PACKWIZ_REPO is set
if [ -n "${PACKWIZ_REPO}" ]; then
  echo "[2/3] Cloning packwiz repository..."
  BRANCH="${PACKWIZ_BRANCH:-main}"
  git clone --branch "$BRANCH" --single-branch "$PACKWIZ_REPO" /tmp/packwiz-repo 2>/dev/null
  if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    cp /tmp/packwiz-repo/* /tmp/packwiz-repo/.gitignore . 2>/dev/null || true
    cp -r /tmp/packwiz-repo/mods . 2>/dev/null || true
    cp -r /tmp/packwiz-repo/config . 2>/dev/null || true
    cp -r /tmp/packwiz-repo/assets . 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -rf /tmp/packwiz-repo
    echo "  Repository cloned successfully."
  else
    echo "  WARNING: Failed to clone repository. Using existing files."
  fi
fi

# Run packwiz install to download all mods/assets
if [ -f "packwiz.toml" ]; then
  echo "[3/3] Running packwiz install to download modpack files..."
  if packwiz install; then
    echo "  packwiz install completed successfully."
  else
    echo "  ERROR: packwiz install failed!"
    echo "  Check your packwiz.toml configuration and internet connection."
    exit 1
  fi
else
  echo "[3/3] No packwiz.toml found."
  echo "  Please upload your packwiz configuration files via the file manager."
  echo "  Expected: packwiz.toml, mods/, config/ (optional)"
fi

echo "========================================"
echo "  Setup Complete!"
echo "========================================"

variables.name: JAVA_VERSION
variables.description: Java version for the Minecraft server.

display.name: Java Version
display.description: The Java version to run the Minecraft server with.

display.name: Server Port
display.description: Port for players to connect to the server.

variables.name: STARTER_MEM
variables.description: Initial Java heap size in MB (Xms).

display.name: Initial Memory (MB)
display.description: Starting heap size for the JVM.

variables.name: MAX_MEM
variables.description: Maximum Java heap size in MB (Xmx).

display.name: Max Memory (MB)
display.description: Maximum heap size for the JVM.

variables.name: JAVA_OPTS
variables.description: Additional JVM arguments for performance tuning.

display.name: Java Options
display.description: Extra JVM arguments (GC flags, performance tweaks).

variables.name: PACKWIZ_REPO
variables.description: Git repository URL containing your packwiz config. Leave empty if uploading files manually.

display.name: Packwiz Repo URL
display.description: Git repository with packwiz.toml and mods/. Auto-cloned during setup.

variables.name: PACKWIZ_BRANCH
variables.description: Git branch to use when cloning the packwiz repo.

display.name: Packwiz Repo Branch
display.description: Branch to checkout from the packwiz repository.
